deployment_evidence.governance_note: release_sha is the application merge commit (PR #414). A docs-only signoff commit may sit on main tip; use manual production dispatch with release_sha equal to this value after staging verification. Auto production after staging requires staged head SHA to equal release_sha (see deploy-production.yml).
